summary: Patched resistor value 1k to 2k in both ROOT.DSN and ROOT.CDB. User reported project opened and displayed/properties showed 2k. Resaved output stable.
Patched resistor value in ROOT.DSN only. User reported Proteus opened but displayed/properties stayed 1k. ROOT.CDB won and DSN display normalized back.
Patched resistor value in ROOT.CDB only. User reported Proteus opened and displayed/properties showed 2k. ROOT.CDB is authoritative for resistor values.
Patched terminal label A to B minimally in ROOT.DSN. User reported project opened and terminal displayed/properties showed B.
Patched terminal A to B using known nearby diff bytes. User reported project opened and label showed B. Minimal patch D1 was sufficient.
Multi-resistor terminal networks showed ROOT.CDB identical across isolated, series, parallel, ladder, divider, copied branches when refs/values same. Topology lives in ROOT.DSN.

human_notes: Ported the locked V9 resistor-terminal method into D:/Coding/protuesgen. Added a record-schema donor fixture, deterministic v0.1 resistor JSON parser/validator, E001-based generator, CLI wrapper, 20 predefined V0/G0 power-ground cases, and tests. Current safe endpoint rules remain $TERPOWER only on left endpoints and $TERGROUND only on right endpoints with two-character labels V0/G0.
result_summary: Main generator implementation static pass; ready for user Proteus screenshot feedback.

human_notes: Built POWER_T03_6R_V0_ENDPOINT_ATTEMPT, POWER_T04_R21_V0_ENDPOINT_ATTEMPT, GROUND_T01_6R_G0_ENDPOINT_ATTEMPT, GROUND_T02_R21_G0_ENDPOINT_ATTEMPT, BOTH_T01_6R_V0_G0_SHORTWIRE_ATTEMPT, and BOTH_T02_R21_V0_G0_SHORTWIRE_ATTEMPT from D:/Coding/protuesgen. Current generator supports locked short-wire endpoint methods only: $TERPOWER replaces $TERINPUT on left V0 endpoints; $TERGROUND replaces $TEROUTPUT on right G0 endpoints.
result_summary: Static pass: six locked power/ground endpoint examples generated from E001 with no static validation issues.

human_notes: Implemented orientation-aware V9 resistor emission. Public Proteus samples show the rotation field immediately after the final model placement x/y pair; -900 tenths rotates the resistor vertical. The oriented requested batch uses vertical power-ground simple loop, parallel/current-divider legs, divider stacks, star arms, bridge/H-bridge branches, and R-2R ladder shunts.
result_summary: Static pass: 15 oriented user-requested resistor networks generated from JSON with real vertical angle fields and no static validation issues.

human_notes: Added layout.visual_wires support for deterministic standalone WIRE records after resistor groups. The generated batch now draws shared parallel rails, bridge links, delta closure, and R-2R ladder bus links in addition to using real 90-degree resistor symbols.
